q: What kind of photos do you take?
examiner_note: Giám khảo muốn biết về sở trường và phong cách nhiếp ảnh của bạn. Bạn nên liệt kê một vài thể loại (genres) như: ảnh phong cảnh (landscapes), ảnh chân dung (portraits), hay ảnh đời thường (street photography). Hãy giải thích tại sao bạn lại chọn những chủ thể đó. Các cụm từ như 'candid moments', 'architectural details', 'vivid landscapes' sẽ giúp câu trả lời chuyên nghiệp hơn.

band7.text: I mostly take photos of my friends and family during special occasions like birthdays or holidays. I also like taking pictures of my food when I go to nice restaurants, as it's a good way to share my experiences with others on social media.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, đưa ra các ví dụ cụ thể (friends, family, food). Sử dụng từ vựng tự nhiên và gần gũi.

band8.text: I’m primarily drawn to landscape and street photography. I love capturing the vibrant energy of city life and the quiet beauty of natural scenery. I particularly enjoy taking 'candid shots' of people going about their daily lives, as I find they tell a much more authentic story than posed portraits.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng chuyên môn tốt (landscape, street photography, vibrant energy, candid shots, authentic story, posed portraits). Cách dẫn đạt trôi chảy.

band9.text: My photography is quite eclectic, but I have a particular affinity for architectural details and minimalist compositions. I find that focusing on the interplay of light and geometric shapes can result in some truly compelling imagery. Additionally, I frequently document my travels through a mix of sweeping vistas and intimate close-ups, aiming to create a comprehensive visual narrative of the places I visit.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (eclectic, affinity, architectural details, minimalist compositions, interplay, geometric shapes, compelling imagery, sweeping vistas, intimate close-ups, visual narrative). Cách lập luận mang tính nghệ thuật cao.

v.meaning: đa dạng/pha trộn từ nhiều nguồn
v.example: Her taste in music is very eclectic, ranging from jazz to heavy metal.

v.meaning: sự yêu thích/hợp với cái gì đó
v.example: He has a natural affinity for languages and speaks four fluently.
The photographer captured the intricate architectural details of the old cathedral.
Minimalist composition often relies on a lot of negative space to create impact.

v.meaning: hình ảnh đầy sức thuyết phục/hấp dẫn
v.example: The documentary uses compelling imagery to highlight the effects of climate change.

v.meaning: vẻ đẹp bao la/tầm nhìn rộng lớn
v.example: The hotel balcony offers sweeping vistas of the entire mountain range.

v.meaning: những bức ảnh chụp cận cảnh thân mật
v.example: The book features intimate close-ups of rare flowers in the rainforest.
The series of photos creates a powerful visual narrative of the refugee crisis.

v.meaning: những khoảnh khắc tự nhiên/không chuẩn bị
v.example: I prefer taking photos of candid moments rather than posed groups.

v.meaning: những phong cảnh rực rỡ/sống động
v.example: Her paintings are famous for their vivid landscapes and bold colors.

v.meaning: ảnh chân dung đã được dàn xếp/diễn
v.example: Commercial photography often involves a lot of posed portraits.
Street photography requires a quick eye and a lot of patience.
Macro photography reveals details that are invisible to the naked eye.

v.meaning: nhiếp ảnh động vật hoang dã
v.example: Wildlife photography can be dangerous and requires specialized equipment.
Fashion photography is a highly competitive and fast-paced industry.
Good lighting is essential for high-quality food photography.
Black and white photography has a timeless and dramatic feel.

v.meaning: màu nâu đỏ (phong cách ảnh cổ)
v.example: This filter adds a sepia tone to your photos for a vintage look.
High-key lighting is often used in beauty and product photography.

v.meaning: ảnh tông tối (nhiều bóng tối, tương phản cao)
v.example: Low-key photography is perfect for creating a mysterious atmosphere.
The artist's subject matter usually revolves around nature and technology.
In this composition, the bright red lighthouse is the focal point.

v.meaning: quy tắc một phần ba (trong bố cục)
v.example: Applying the rule of thirds can make your photos look more professional.
The road creates great leading lines that draw the viewer's eye into the distance.

v.meaning: hiệu ứng làm mờ hậu cảnh (đốm sáng mờ)
v.example: A fast lens is necessary to achieve a beautiful bokeh effect.
A shallow depth of field is used to isolate the subject from the background.
A slow shutter speed can create a beautiful blur in moving water.
Choosing a wide aperture allows more light to reach the sensor.
Don't increase the ISO settings too much, or the photo will be grainy.
A tripod is essential for night-time and long-exposure photography.
Using an external flash can help soften harsh shadows.
The assistant held a reflector to bounce light onto the model's face.

v.meaning: hậu kỳ/xỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp
v.example: Post-processing allows you to correct exposure and enhance colors.

v.meaning: định dạng ảnh thô (chứa nhiều thông tin để chỉnh sửa)
v.example: Professional photographers always shoot in RAW format for maximum flexibility.
Lightroom is arguably the best editing software for organizing and processing photos.

v.meaning: các thiết lập sẵn (để chỉnh màu nhanh)
v.example: I created some custom presets to give my photos a consistent look.
Be careful with sharpening; too much can make the photo look unnatural.
The new software has a very effective Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư-powered noise reduction tool.
The white dress looks completely flat because the photo is overexposed.
The shadows are too dark, suggesting the image is underexposed.

v.meaning: dải động (khả năng cân bằng sáng tối)
v.example: Modern cameras have an incredible dynamic range that captures detail in both shadows and highlights.
The arch of the bridge provided perfect framing for the city skyline.
We climbed to the rooftop to get a better vantage point for the fireworks.
I used a remote shutter release to avoid vibrating the camera on the tripod.
Long exposure photography can turn moving clouds into a soft blur.
Use burst mode when photographing fast-moving action like sports.
I took a panoramic photo to capture the whole mountain valley.
The time-lapse video showed the flower blooming in just thirty seconds.
Every photo you post online becomes part of your digital footprint.

v.meaning: thẩm mỹ về mặt thị giác
v.example: The director is known for his unique and haunting visual aesthetic.
